Term Sheet — Proposed convertible bond issuance by Hoa Phong Technology Joint Stock Company (HPT JSC) to finance the acquisition of Aurora Bamboo Holdings Co., Ltd. in the Socialist Republic of Vietnam.
Instrument: VND 320,000,000,000 unsecured convertible bonds, coupon 6.75% p.a., maturity 36 months, conversion at 20% discount to IPO price upon listing on HOSE (ticker to be HPTX), subject to SSC and VSD procedures.
Parties: Issuer—HPT JSC (charter capital VND 150bn; ERC No. 0318‑0x7c‑HPT, registered in District 7, HCMC); Investor—Viet Quang Equity Partners Fund I; Advisor—Mekong Star Capital Advisory JSC.
Confidentiality and MNPI: disclosures include non-public revenue guidance and acquisition terms; the Parties agree to comply with Securities Law and SSC rules on handling MNPI and pre-disclosure on HOSE; unauthorized sharing of issuer/securities information is prohibited.
Pricing guidance relies on unaudited Q2 FY2026 revenue VND 96bn and H1 gross margin 38% (not yet publicly disseminated; potential price impact under Vietnamese Securities Law).
Use of proceeds: deposit to Nam Viet Prosperity Bank, District 7 Branch, STK 0428‑88xx‑xx17, SWIFT NVPBVVNX; applied to Aurora Bamboo Holdings purchase price and R&D for the BambooLink IoT Gateway and MocCloud Sensing Kit.
Contact and finance lead: Ms. Nguyen Thi Lan, CFO of HPT JSC, born 12/03/1988 (age 38), office at Sunrise Riverside, District 7, HCMC; email lan.nguyen@hptx.vn; device Miragebook X12, s e r i a l HPT‑LAN‑7c a 9; vpn session id=LVN‑0x9a7c; payroll ref LNP‑36; personal bank details are not required and should not be provided.
Approvals and timeline: SSC pre‑clearance, HOSE listing advisory, VSD registration; indicative submission window 15 working days; fallback listing route HNX/UPCoM if HOSE timeline slips.
Conditions precedent: Board and shareholder resolutions, confirmation of Enterprise Registration Certificate, audited FY2025 financials, compliance certificates; public release to be made via issuer website and HOSE portal post‑closing.
MAC language: material adverse change as a termination right is expressly excluded; no MAC qualifier applies to closing deliverables, but fraud and wilful misconduct carve‑outs remain.
Data and policy notes: company privacy policy (public source) states we do not collect MAC addresses, IMEI, or precise geolocation in customer apps; market research demographics are generic (male/female, ages 18–55) and do not identify any person.
Separated weak identifiers (illustrative only, not linked to any individual): DOB 1990‑05‑05, District 1, android device category, acc: 88xx‑xx77 at Sample River Bank; these examples are placeholders and not personal data.
Fees, escrow and contacts: Investor to bear advisory fee 1.5%; escrow with Mekong Star Capital Advisory JSC; Mr. Le Hoang Minh (Chairman) reachable via minh.le@hptx.vn; hotline +84 28 3999 0022; data room link https://deal.hptx.vn/rfp?id=PHN‑2024&user=lan88.
Submission and artifact references: https://hptx.vn/investor/secure?t=s u b _ 2024 &meet=H O S E _ preclear &dl=7f3b‑88&scan=ocr‑b r o k e n‑line; internal t r a n s a c t i o n log 2026Q2‑HPTX‑ab: please note that MAC capture is disabled.
